WorkerProfile.title: WorkerProfile
WorkerProfile.description: Represents a worker's profile with personal details, roles, and permissions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WorkerProfile entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the worker.

lastName.description: The last name of the worker.

email.description: The email address of the worker.

phone.description: The phone number of the worker.

role.description: The role of the worker within the organization.

permissions.description: A list of permissions granted to the worker.

Approval.title: Approval
Approval.description: Represents an approval record for worker registrations or profile updates.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Approval entity.

approverId.description: Reference to the approver's WorkerProfile. (Self-referential relationship: WorkerProfile 1:N Approval)

approvalDate.description: The date and time when the approval was given.

status.description: The current status of the approval (e.g., 'pending', 'approved', 'rejected').

notes.description: Additional notes or comments related to the approval.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a room that can be reserved.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Room entity.

capacity.description: The maximum capacity of the room.

description.description: A description of the room and its features.

Equipment.title: Equipment
Equipment.description: Represents a piece of equipment that can be borrowed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Equipment entity.

available.description: Indicates whether the equipment is currently available.

Reservation.title: Reservation
Reservation.description: Represents a reservation for a room.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reservation entity.

startTime.description: The start date and time of the reservation.

endTime.description: The end date and time of the reservation.

notes.description: Additional notes or comments related to the reservation.

Mealstub.title: Mealstub
Mealstub.description: Represents a mealstub generated for a worker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Mealstub entity.

generationDate.description: The date when the mealstub was generated.

validUntil.description: The date and time until which the mealstub is valid.

qrCode.description: The QR code associated with the mealstub.

validated.description: Indicates whether the mealstub has been validated.

AttendanceRecord.title: AttendanceRecord
AttendanceRecord.description: Represents an attendance record for a worker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AttendanceRecord entity.

clockInTime.description: The date and time when the worker clocked in.

clockOutTime.description: The date and time when the worker clocked out.

definition.description: Stores worker profile information. Uses path-based ownership for security. Includes worker's role and permissions, denormalized for authorization independence.

params.name: workerProfileId
params.description: The unique ID of the worker profile.

definition.description: Stores approval records for worker profiles. Uses path-based ownership for security, tied to the worker profile. Includes denormalized data related to approval status and approver's permissions to ensure authorization independence.

params.name: workerProfileId
params.description: The unique ID of the worker profile to which the approval applies.

params.name: approvalId
params.description: The unique ID of the approval record.

params.name: roomId
params.description: The unique ID of the room.

definition.description: Stores reservation information for rooms. Uses path-based ownership under the room document.

params.name: roomId
params.description: The unique ID of the room.

params.name: reservationId
params.description: The unique ID of the reservation.

definition.description: Stores mealstub information. Includes the workerProfileId to link it to a worker profile for authorization.

params.name: mealstubId
params.description: The unique ID of the mealstub.

definition.description: Stores attendance records for workers. Includes the workerProfileId to link it to a worker profile for authorization.

params.name: attendanceRecordId
params.description: The unique ID of the attendance record.

params.name: equipmentId
params.description: The unique ID of the equipment.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the COGApp's features, focusing on worker profile management, room reservations, mealstub generation, and attendance tracking. The design prioritizes security, scalability, and ease of debugging. Authorization independence is achieved by denormalizing relevant authorization data (such as role and permissions) directly into the documents where access control is needed, avoiding `get()` calls in security rules.  Specifically, the design implements path-based ownership for entities that represent a `User 1:N Entity` relationship. For collaborative data, the design leverages membership maps when appropriate, although in this specific case, no collaborative data was apparent.  

*   `/worker_profiles/{workerProfileId}`: Stores worker profiles. Approvals are located in a subcollection. This structure segregates worker data from approval workflows, which allows clear and robust security rules.
*   `/worker_profiles/{workerProfileId}/approvals/{approvalId}`: Subcollection for approvals related to worker profiles. Authorization relies on the approver's role and permissions, denormalized into the Approval documents, which ensures that the approver has permissions to approve the specific profile changes.
*   `/rooms/{roomId}`: Stores room details. Each room document includes information about its capacity and features. Reservations are located in a subcollection.
*   `/rooms/{roomId}/reservations/{reservationId}`: Subcollection for room reservations. This includes the workerProfileId making the reservation and the approvalId, if applicable. Authorization relies on the worker's profile and potentially approval status (if required).
*   `/mealstubs/{mealstubId}`: Stores mealstub details, including the workerProfileId, generation date, validity, type, QR code, and validation status.
*   `/attendance_records/{attendanceRecordId}`: Stores attendance records, including workerProfileId, clock-in/out times, and a reference to the mealstubId (if applicable).
